microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **cyber resilience** validation program from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual recovery drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned proof-of-concept execution to a scalable, repeatable model across enterprise workloads.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating technical and business stakeholders at the C-suite level.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model adopted across cloud infrastructure.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured recovery planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21%, directly enabling the SE team to support a larger portfolio of enterprise data-protection engagements.
microsoft_2023: Championed **pre-sales-style adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting demos and enablement sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the product roadmap by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly translating **business and technical requirements** into an intent-based YAML generation capability.

Improved data integrity and accelerated retrieval by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting **lookup time by 83%** across internal technical teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, mirroring the consultative deal-support model central to pre-sales SE work.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built and presented a business case roadmap to senior leadership to automate critical paths and reduce TCO across the infrastructure lifecycle.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact automation investments and surface inefficiencies — directly paralleling TCO modeling and value-proof deliverables in enterprise sales cycles.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, demonstrating the solution-architecture and deployment-planning skills core to pre-sales SE engagements.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the **software deployment cycle by 25%** and reducing risk across a distributed, enterprise-scale infrastructure environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and demonstrating the cross-functional coordination required to shepherd complex technical opportunities to successful outcomes.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing end-to-end scoping and proposal workflows for 200+ monthly engagements via a redesigned CRM process, building the pipeline-management and Salesforce-style documentation discipline central to enterprise SE territory planning.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, demonstrating the ability to translate business objectives into field-level sales campaigns aligned with partner and channel motions.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks and improve **leadership pricing models**, directly paralleling the TCO modeling and business-case creation skills required to influence C-level buying decisions.

Used 'proof-of-concept', 'TCO modeling', and 'business-case creation' — all explicit JD requirements — in microsoft_2022 bullets 2–3 and pro_painters bullet 3 to surface pre-sales SE competencies.

Embedded 'sovereign-cloud', 'enterprise workloads', and 'C-suite' in microsoft_ft bullets 3–4 to reflect the JD's emphasis on trusted-advisor engagement at all account levels including executive sponsors.
Mirrored 'Technical Account Planning', 'territory planning', and 'CRM/Salesforce documentation' from the JD into pro_painters bullet 1 and microsoft_ft framing to signal SE operational discipline.
Trimmed to role mins (5/3/3/3/3) from prior maxes to eliminate page overflow while preserving all high-impact, JD-aligned substance.
